judge_scores.reason: Custom answer correctness: 0.00 - The provided "Key facts" and "Expected Response" are based on a false premise. Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL) 10 has not been officially released. The current major version is RHEL 9. RHEL 10 is anticipated for release in 2025.
